description.en: Returns an iterator object which will iterate over nodes in a topological order. When using this method, prepare() and done() should not be called. This method is equivalent to: def static_order(self): self.prepare() while self.is_active(): node_group = self.get_ready() yield from node_group self.done(*node_group) The particular order that is returned may depend on the specific order in which the items were inserted in the graph. For example: >>> ts = TopologicalSorter() >>> ts.add(3, 2, 1) >...
